title: Kingsburg Truck Sales Bolsters Workhorse Partnership as Workhorse Sharpens Commercial EV Focus
text:
Kingsburg Truck Sales Bolsters Workhorse Partnership as Workhorse Sharpens Commercial EV Focus

Date: June 12, 2024

Key Details

Workhorse Group announced a strategic partnership with Kingsburg Truck Sales, its certified California dealer. The collaboration includes Kingsburg's commitment to purchase 141 units of the Workhorse W4 CC Class 4 battery-electric cab chassis trucks, contingent on receiving California HVIP vouchers.

Kingsburg's President Jerry Smith expressed enthusiasm: The Workhorse W4 CC is a practical, reliable electric truck that replaces traditional ICE models without sacrificing performance with up to 150-mile range.

The company also completed the divestiture of its Aero business to ATW Partners LLC, generating approximately $375,000 in monthly cost savings. CEO Rick Dauch noted this move allows Workhorse to concentrate on its commercial EV truck business and provides additional financial flexibility.

Kingsburg is offering promotional pricing on three W4 CC configurations (Flatbed, Utility Bed, and Landscape Body) while supplies and HVIP vouchers remain available.
